differential_diagnoses: Neurodegenerative dementia (e.g., Alzheimer's disease) with superimposed vascular pathology
next_steps: Order comprehensive autoimmune and paraneoplastic encephalitis panel (serum and CSF, including LGI1, CASPR2, Ma2, Hu, NMDA-R)
Perform whole-body PET/CT scan to screen for occult malignancy
Perform RT-QuIC and 14-3-3 testing on CSF
Evaluate for CSF cytology and flow cytometry
Obtain follow-up imaging (MRI with contrast) to assess for changing enhancement patterns
Consider empiric trial of high-dose corticosteroids if autoimmune etiology is highly suspected
Initiate seizure precautions and anti-seizure medication (e.g., levetiracetam) due to EEG findings
